title: OpenEnder
description: OpenEnder lets you open your Ender Chest from your inventory instantly, giving you fast access to your private storage without placing a chest.
body:
**OpenEnder** is a lightweight Minecraft Paper plugin that lets players open their Ender Chest directly from their inventory, no placement required. Just right-click an Ender Chest item and access your private storage instantly. **Key Features** * Open Ender Chests without placing them * Fully server-side, no client mods required * Lightweight and server-friendly * Works automatically with no commands or configuration needed **Functionality** In vanilla Minecraft, players must place an Ender Chest in the world to access it, which can slow down gameplay and inventory management. OpenEnder lets you open your Ender Chest directly from your inventory. Access, organize, and move items quickly without interrupting your flow. **Installation** OpenEnder is a server-side plugin. Drop it in your `plugins` folder and reload your server. No client installation is required. **Disclaimer** OpenEnder works with standard Ender Chests. Behavior with modded Ender Chest variants may vary. --- **Credits** Special thanks to my girlfriend for making the project icon!

🛠 Support & Bug Reports

Found a bug or need help setting up the plugin?
Report issues directly on Discord.
